# Git Light

> Git Light is a free, open-source desktop Git client for macOS with a graph-first interface — commit graph, branch sidebar, working tree panel, and real local repository operations via the native Git CLI.

## Key facts

- **Type:** Desktop application (Electron)
- **License:** MIT (free and open source)
- **Platform:** macOS (DMG from GitHub Releases)
- **Version:** 0.1.6
- **Author:** ftuyama
- **Stack:** Electron 41, Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, Tailwind CSS 4

## What it does

Git Light runs real `git` commands against local repositories. Users can open a folder, browse commit history on a virtualized SVG graph, manage branches/tags/stashes/worktrees, stage and commit changes (including per-hunk staging), view diffs, fetch/pull/push, merge, rebase (including interactive rebase), resolve merge conflicts, search commits and files, and use an integrated terminal.

## Main features

- Commit graph with lanes, infinite scroll, and keyboard navigation
- Branch sidebar with favorites, remotes, tags, stashes, worktrees; drag-and-drop merge/rebase
- Working tree with flat or tree file list, per-hunk staging, conflict resolution
- Interactive rebase dialog (reorder, squash, fixup, drop, edit)
- Remote sync (fetch, pull, push) with ahead/behind counts
- Integrated terminal (xterm.js + node-pty)
- Themes: Default, Dracula, Light, Claude, System
- Auto-update checks against GitHub Releases
- Resizable three-pane layout with collapsible sidebars

## Not yet supported

- Clone repositories from the UI
- Hosting provider authentication UI

## Links

- Website: https://ftuyama.github.io/git-light/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/ftuyama/git-light
- Download (macOS DMG): https://github.com/ftuyama/git-light/releases
- Sponsor: https://ko-fi.com/lelouchiee
- Developer docs: https://github.com/ftuyama/git-light/blob/main/DEVELOPER.md
- Architecture: https://github.com/ftuyama/git-light/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md

## Install

Download the latest `.dmg` from GitHub Releases, drag Git Light into Applications, and launch. For development: `git clone https://github.com/ftuyama/git-light.git && cd git-light && npm install && npm run dev`.
